name: false_belief_attitude_is_valid_and_quarantined
group: Y - attitude and theory of mind (4.0.0)
note: 4.0.0 Rule 25 (the doxastic quarantine): an attitude whose content contradicts the actual record is VALID and raises NO conflict - the mismatch IS a false belief, first-class and shareable. The contradiction between the believed claim and the actual claim is real (the formal conflict test finds it between the CLAIMS), but the attitude never asserts its content.
